name: lobes-realtime-site
_pinning_note: Deliberately complete (issue #151 t10): three wave-2 tasks (t11 mic/audio island, t12 event-stream UI, t13 local WS proxy + dev flow) build inside site/ in PARALLEL and none of them may edit this file. astro + the two @fontsource-variable packages + @astrojs/check + typescript cover the Astro build itself. vitest + jsdom + @types/node are the offline/fixture-test stack t11 (worklet encode-path fixtures) and t12 (event-fixture replay) need — jsdom gives a DOM without a real browser. ws + @types/ws cover t13's standalone local WebSocket-proxy fallback (used only if the Astro/Vite dev-server server.proxy upgrade-header injection turns out not to work on this Vite major — see docs/plans t13 acceptance and risk note). None of vitest/jsdom/ws ship in the built dist/ output — they are dev-only tooling, never imported by site code that astro build compiles.
